data.name: Alisa's Grimoire
data.detailed_description:
Alisa, the protagonist attending a certain academy,
comes across a Grimoire that seals the soul of a powerful sorcerer by chance.

Through its power, Alisa becomes a sorcerer herself and learns that the academy she attends is actually a laboratory for magical experiments.

To save her loved ones from danger and to strengthen her own abilities, Alisa takes on a battle against sorcerers.

A modern-style RPG.
Engage with incidents occurring in the academy and town.

  • JRPG

  • Rich CG content

  • Classic command-based battle system

  • Defeat enemies to steal and equip their skills.

  • Original enemy graphics.

data.short_description: Alisa comes across a Grimoire that seals the soul of a powerful sorcerer by chance. Through its power, Alisa becomes a sorcerer and learns that the academy is actually a laboratory for magical experiments. To save her loved ones, Alisa takes on a battle against sorcerers.
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
